query:
UPDATE reading_progress kept
               SET progress = GREATEST(kept.progress, old.progress),
                   current_chapter = CASE
                     WHEN old.progress > kept.progress
                     THEN CASE WHEN $4
                               THEN mapping.chapter_a_index ELSE mapping.chapter_b_index END
                     ELSE kept.current_chapter
                   END,
                   chapter_id = CASE
                     WHEN old.progress > kept.progress
                     THEN CASE WHEN $4
                               THEN mapping.chapter_a_id ELSE mapping.chapter_b_id END
                     ELSE kept.chapter_id
                   END,
                   chapter_index = CASE
                     WHEN old.progress > kept.progress
                     THEN CASE WHEN $4
                               THEN mapping.chapter_a_index ELSE mapping.chapter_b_index END
                     ELSE kept.chapter_index
                   END,
                   reading_time_secs = kept.reading_time_secs + old.reading_time_secs,
                   last_read_at = GREATEST(kept.last_read_at, old.last_read_at),
                   updated_at = NOW()
               FROM reading_progress old
               JOIN duplicate_chapter_matches mapping
                 ON mapping.pair_id = $3
                AND old.chapter_id = CASE WHEN $4
                                          THEN mapping.chapter_b_id ELSE mapping.chapter_a_id END
                AND CASE WHEN $4
                         THEN mapping.chapter_a_id ELSE mapping.chapter_b_id END IS NOT NULL
                AND mapping.match_type IN ('conservative', 'layout')
                AND mapping.similarity >= 0.999999
                AND EXISTS (
                  SELECT 1
                  FROM chapter_fingerprints source_fp
                  JOIN chapter_fingerprints target_fp
                    ON target_fp.source_content_hash = source_fp.source_content_hash
                  WHERE source_fp.chapter_id = CASE WHEN $4
                                                    THEN mapping.chapter_b_id ELSE mapping.chapter_a_id END
                    AND target_fp.chapter_id = CASE WHEN $4
                                                   THEN mapping.chapter_a_id ELSE mapping.chapter_b_id END
                )
               WHERE kept.book_id = $1
                 AND old.book_id = $2
                 AND kept.user_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM old.user_id
